fallback_contact.name: Raul Gonzales
fallback_contact.title: President, Blue Lake Construction & Consulting Engineers Corp.
fallback_contact.rationale: Small-to-mid GC; Raul is the decision-maker. Per BBB, Blue Lake handles new builds (residential, commercial, industrial), renovations, design-build, and assists with permits + initial cost estimates — likely Raul does estimating personally given firm size. Best play: phone the office, ask for Raul, lead with a 2-line value prop on automated daily reports (small GCs hate paperwork).

needs_review_flags: No dedicated estimator surfaced; firm is small enough that the President likely handles estimating
Phone the company directly — no public email for Raul
personalization_hooks: Small/owner-led GC — fast decision-maker, no committee
Pitch the 5:30 PM automated daily report as a 'pretend you have admin staff' angle
Cross-sector (commercial, industrial, residential) — variety of paint scopes possible
